priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: price constraint silently dropped for 40% of sessions, 100% reproducible across all platforms, core value-proposition (budget-aware AI) broken, similar bugs FLIPPI-1637 and FLIPPI-1017 rated P1
severity_justification: The price constraint is silently dropped in the orchestration layer, affecting 100% of price-filtered sessions (~40% of all SLAP chat sessions). This is core value-proposition damage — SLAP's fundamental promise as a budget-aware AI is broken — but it is not a crash, checkout blockage, secrets leak, or complete outage, which keeps it at P1 rather than P0. Similar historical bugs FLIPPI-1637 and FLIPPI-1017 (wrong/unavailable results) were both triaged P1 by the team.
owner_reason: Assigned to 3 of the top 5 similar bugs (FLIPPI-1888, FLIPPI-1637, FLIPPI-1017) all involving AI search relevance and filter-constraint failures in the chat recommendation pipeline

similar_bugs.summary: user query for above price range but results are for below range
